title: ITALY enforcement action against Liceo Scientifico Morgagni di Roma (2,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on the Liceo Scientifico Morgagni di Roma. During a 'sex-affective education meeting', the controller handed out divided A4 sheets to students. The sheets had previously been used for other purposes and contain...
